_comment: Home-harness agent profiles for harness/home_driver.py (Path A / H-home).
Each profile's `cmd` is run with cwd = the task workspace; the literal token
'{prompt}' is replaced with the wrapper instruction. The agent must read
VERIFY the CLI is installed and the invocation/flags are current before a
scored run — these are the production harnesses the models were post-trained
against, so the exact tool surface matters (Cai). See docs/TEST-MATRIX.md §2.

claude_code.notes: Claude Code print-mode, isolated (no MCP, skip-permissions). Pass --model (e.g. claude-opus-4-8, claude-opus-4-7, claude-sonnet-4-6) to pick the variant.

codex_cli.notes: Codex requires images attached with -i; the agent cannot read them from the workspace like Claude Code. Structural image-handoff difference — see docs/NOISE-FLOOR-STUDY.md.

antigravity.notes: Google Antigravity CLI (agy, ~/.local/bin/agy, OAuth). Reasoning is BAKED INTO the model picker — pass --model 'Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)' / 'Gemini 3.5 Flash (Low)' etc. (run `agy models`). Pass --effort too for the record/scaffold; it is not added to the cmd (no effort_tmpl).

qwen_code.image_primitive: agent reads via Qwen Code read tool (vision auto-switch)
qwen_code.notes: Qwen Code (Gemini-CLI fork). Working recipe from wanderbench run_native_harness.py: route via OPENAI_* env vars (--auth-type openai), -o text, stdin=DEVNULL. Pass --model = the OpenRouter SLUG (e.g. qwen/qwen3.7-plus).

fake_perfect.notes: Self-test only: writes the perfect submission from truth. No real agent.

qwen_code_or.image_primitive: agent reads via Qwen Code read tool (vision auto-switch)
qwen_code_or.notes: Qwen Code routing NON-Qwen open models via OpenRouter (not on DashScope). Pass --model = OpenRouter slug. Some models hang the agentic-vision loop (qwen3.7-plus does) — probe first.
